metadata.name: ASF Trust Graph Model v1
metadata.description: Trust Graph Model for deriving hidden security assumptions from system architecture relationships across 20 reference architecture patterns

User.description: Human actor or external entity interacting with the system

Service.description: Application service, microservice, backend component, or function

Data Store.description: Persistent data storage: databases, caches, queues, object stores

Network Gateway.description: Network ingress/egress: load balancers, API gateways, proxies, VPNs, CDNs

Auth Service.description: Identity provider, SSO, MFA, federation service

Infrastructure.description: Cloud regions, availability zones, clusters, namespaces, VPCs

Security Control.description: WAFs, firewalls, network policies, security groups, DDoS protection

Pipeline.description: CI/CD, build systems, artifact registries, deployment automation

External Entity.description: Third-party vendors, partners, SaaS providers, external systems

Observability.description: Monitoring, logging, alerting, SIEM, audit systems

Secrets Store.description: Vault, KMS, key management, secrets rotation systems

Certificate Authority.description: Internal CA, mTLS certificate authority, certificate management

Orchestrator.description: Kubernetes, container orchestration, scheduler, service mesh control plane

Message Bus.description: Event streams, message queues, Kafka, Kinesis, notification systems

authenticates_to.description: User or service authenticates identity to a system component
authenticates_to.trust_semantic: Source trusts target to verify their identity correctly
assumptions_implied: Identity verification is accurate and not bypassed
Authentication channel is secure against interception
Credentials are not compromised or shared

authorizes.description: Auth service issues authorization decision or token for a target
authorizes.trust_semantic: Source's authorization decision is accepted by target
assumptions_implied: Authorization decisions are consistent across all enforcement points
Token/assertion is signed and cannot be forged
Authorization is scoped to least privilege required
authorizes.verification_method: Review authorization policies and audit logs

invokes.description: One component invokes or calls another
invokes.trust_semantic: Source trusts target to respond correctly and securely
assumptions_implied: Target service is available within SLA commitments
Invocation is authenticated and authorized
Response integrity is preserved in transit
invokes.verification_method: Test service availability and response integrity

reads_from.description: Service reads data from a data store
reads_from.trust_semantic: Source trusts target to return correct, consistent, available data
assumptions_implied: Data read from store is consistent and uncorrupted
Read replicas are within acceptable replication lag
Data store is available and queries do not time out
reads_from.verification_method: Validate query performance and replication lag metrics

writes_to.description: Service writes data to a data store
writes_to.trust_semantic: Source trusts target to durably persist writes
assumptions_implied: Write operations are validated and sanitized
Data written is encrypted at rest
Write capacity is sufficient for peak load
writes_to.verification_method: Audit write operations and storage encryption configuration

routes_to.description: Network gateway routes traffic to a destination service
routes_to.trust_semantic: Source correctly routes traffic without inspection or modification
assumptions_implied: Routing rules are correctly configured
No unintended traffic paths bypass the gateway
Health checks detect and route around failures
routes_to.verification_method: Review route tables and health check configuration

protects.description: Security control protects a target from threats
protects.trust_semantic: Target trusts source to filter malicious traffic
assumptions_implied: Security control rules are correctly configured and current
Control operates in blocking mode, not just detection
No bypass paths exist around the security control
protects.verification_method: Penetration test security control bypass attempts

monitors.description: Observability system monitors a target for health and security
monitors.trust_semantic: Source trusts target to emit correct telemetry
assumptions_implied: Target emits telemetry in expected format and intervals
Monitoring agent does not introduce vulnerabilities
Monitoring coverage includes all critical paths

deploys.description: Pipeline deploys a service or artifact to target environment
deploys.trust_semantic: Source trusts target to accept and run the correct artifact
assumptions_implied: Deployed artifact matches the approved version
Artifact is signed and verified before deployment
Deployment does not introduce configuration drift
deploys.verification_method: Verify artifact signing and deployment audit trail

manages.trust_semantic: Source is trusted to manage target's lifecycle and scaling
assumptions_implied: Orchestrator has correct RBAC and policy configuration
Orchestrator control plane is available
Resource limits prevent noisy neighbor issues
manages.verification_method: Audit orchestrator RBAC and resource quotas

stores_secrets.description: Secrets store manages secrets for a service
stores_secrets.trust_semantic: Source trusts target to fetch and use secrets correctly
assumptions_implied: Secrets are encrypted at rest and in transit
Dynamic secrets have appropriate TTL
Audit logging is enabled for all secret access
stores_secrets.verification_method: Verify secrets store audit logs and encryption configuration

issues_cert.description: CA issues certificate for a service
issues_cert.trust_semantic: Source trusts target to use certificate correctly
assumptions_implied: Certificate is issued to the correct identity
Private key is stored securely on the target
Certificate rotation happens before expiry
issues_cert.verification_method: Review CA logs and certificate expiry monitoring

depends_on.description: One service depends on another for functionality
depends_on.trust_semantic: Source's correct operation depends on target's availability
assumptions_implied: Downstream service is available within SLA
API compatibility is maintained across versions
Circuit breakers prevent cascade failures
depends_on.verification_method: Test dependency chain resilience with chaos engineering

sends_to.description: Service sends messages or events to a message bus
sends_to.trust_semantic: Source trusts bus to durably accept and route messages
assumptions_implied: Messages are durably persisted by the bus
Producer authentication prevents unauthorized publishing
Message schema is compatible with consumers
sends_to.verification_method: Audit message delivery guarantees and schema registry

consumes_from.description: Service consumes messages or events from a message bus
consumes_from.trust_semantic: Source trusts bus to deliver messages with correct ordering and semantics
assumptions_implied: Messages are delivered at least once with correct ordering
Consumer offsets are correctly managed
Consumer group rebalancing handles failures gracefully
consumes_from.verification_method: Validate consumer lag metrics and rebalance behavior

contains.description: Infrastructure contains or hosts a component
contains.trust_semantic: Source provides isolation and resource guarantees to target
assumptions_implied: Resource isolation between tenants/namespaces is effective
Infrastructure capacity is sufficient for hosted workloads
Boundary controls prevent cross-environment access
contains.verification_method: Review namespace isolation and resource quotas

replicates_to.description: Data store replicates data to another data store
replicates_to.trust_semantic: Source trusts target to stay synchronized within RPO
assumptions_implied: Replication lag stays within RPO limits
Replication link is encrypted in transit
Replica has sufficient capacity for read traffic
replicates_to.verification_method: Monitor replication lag and test failover

backups_to.description: Data store backups data to another store
backups_to.trust_semantic: Source trusts target to retain backup data securely
assumptions_implied: Backup jobs complete successfully within backup window
Backup integrity is verified through restore testing
Backup encryption keys are accessible during recovery

syncs_from.description: Data store synchronizes data from a source store
syncs_from.trust_semantic: Source trusts target's data to be authoritative and current
assumptions_implied: Source data is consistent and not corrupted
Sync frequency meets data freshness requirements
Conflict resolution handles concurrent writes correctly

federates_with.description: Auth service federates with another identity provider
assumptions_implied: Federation metadata is current and validated
Partner IdP enforces equivalent authentication standards
SAML assertions are signed and validated on every request
federates_with.verification_method: Review federation metadata refresh and assertion validation

registers.description: User or service registers identity with auth service
registers.trust_semantic: Source trusts target to store identity securely
assumptions_implied: Registration process validates identity claims
Credentials are stored securely (hashed, encrypted)
Duplicate registrations are detected and prevented
registers.verification_method: Audit registration process and credential storage

connects_via.description: User connects to the system via a network gateway
connects_via.trust_semantic: User trusts gateway to provide secure connectivity
assumptions_implied: VPN/gateway is available and reachable
Connection is encrypted (TLS, IPSec)
Client configuration is correct and compliant
connects_via.verification_method: Test gateway availability and TLS configuration

encrypts.description: Security control encrypts data at rest or in transit
encrypts.trust_semantic: Target trusts source to manage encryption correctly
assumptions_implied: Encryption keys are managed securely and rotated
Encryption algorithm is industry standard (AES-256)
Encryption does not introduce unacceptable latency
encrypts.verification_method: Verify encryption configuration and key rotation policy

audits.trust_semantic: Source trusts target to generate complete audit trail
assumptions_implied: Target generates logs for all security-relevant events
Logs are tamper-proof and immutable
Log retention meets compliance requirements
audits.verification_method: Verify log completeness and immutability controls

alerts.description: Observability system sends alerts to users or services
alerts.trust_semantic: Recipient trusts alerts are accurate and actionable
assumptions_implied: Alert thresholds are correctly configured
Alerts reach the correct recipients within SLA
Alert fatigue does not cause missed critical alerts
alerts.verification_method: Test alert delivery and review threshold configuration

fails_over_to.description: Component fails over to a standby for disaster recovery
fails_over_to.trust_semantic: Source trusts target to assume workload correctly
assumptions_implied: Failover mechanism works automatically or via clear procedure
Standby has sufficient capacity for production load
Failover does not cause data loss beyond RPO
fails_over_to.verification_method: Test failover procedure and validate RTO/RPO

scales.description: Orchestrator scales a service horizontally or vertically
scales.trust_semantic: Target trusts orchestrator to scale correctly
assumptions_implied: Auto-scaling thresholds are correctly configured
Scale-up happens before resource exhaustion
Scale-down does not terminate in-flight requests

discovers.description: Service discovers target via service registry
discovers.trust_semantic: Source trusts registry to return healthy endpoints
assumptions_implied: Service registry returns only healthy endpoints
DNS resolution is internal and not leaked externally
Service mesh discovers services within namespace boundaries
discovers.verification_method: Verify service registry health checks and DNS configuration

caches.description: Component caches data from a data store or origin
caches.trust_semantic: Source trusts cached data to be fresh and correct
assumptions_implied: Cache TTL is appropriate for data freshness requirements
Cache invalidation works correctly on data changes
Cache does not serve stale or unauthorized data
caches.verification_method: Validate cache invalidation and TTL configuration

enforces_policy.description: Security control enforces policy on target
enforces_policy.trust_semantic: Target trusts source to enforce policy correctly
assumptions_implied: Policy rules are comprehensive and current
Default action is deny for unhandled traffic
Policy violations are logged and alerted
enforces_policy.verification_method: Review policy rules and test enforcement

delegates_to.description: Service delegates responsibility to another service
delegates_to.trust_semantic: Source trusts target to handle delegated task correctly
assumptions_implied: Delegated service has equivalent security controls
Delegation context (identity, scope) is preserved
Delegated service is within the same trust boundary
delegates_to.verification_method: Review delegation chain and trust propagation

signs.description: Pipeline signs an artifact to verify its integrity
signs.trust_semantic: Recipient trusts signature to verify artifact origin
assumptions_implied: Signing key is stored securely
Signature verification is performed before deployment
Signing occurs immediately after build, before any modification
signs.verification_method: Verify artifact signing pipeline and key management

verifies.trust_semantic: Source trusts artifact signature and integrity metadata
assumptions_implied: Verification failures block deployment
Verification chain validates all upstream signatures
Verification occurs at runtime, not just at build time
verifies.verification_method: Test verification of unsigned and tampered artifacts

notifies.description: Service notifies user of events or results
notifies.trust_semantic: Recipient trusts notification content and authenticity
assumptions_implied: Notification channel is secure and authenticated
Notifications are delivered in a timely manner
Notification content does not leak sensitive information
notifies.verification_method: Review notification content for data leakage

invoices.description: Service generates invoices for user or external entity
invoices.trust_semantic: Recipient trusts invoice accuracy and authenticity
assumptions_implied: Invoice calculations are accurate and auditable
Invoice data is tamper-proof
Payment information is handled via PCI-compliant systems
invoices.verification_method: Audit invoice generation and payment processing

inheritance_rules.description: Service subtypes inherit trust edge types from parent Service
inheritance_rules.rule: IF subtype_of(Service, subtype) AND edge(Service, E, Target) THEN edge(subtype, E, Target)
inheritance_rules.example: Lambda inherits 'invokes' edge type from Service

inheritance_rules.description: Auth Service subtypes inherit federation edges from parent Auth Service
inheritance_rules.rule: IF subtype_of(AuthService, subtype) AND edge(AuthService, E, Target) THEN edge(subtype, E, Target)
inheritance_rules.example: Okta inherits 'federates_with' edge type from Auth Service

inheritance_rules.description: Data Store subtypes inherit storage edges from parent Data Store
inheritance_rules.rule: IF subtype_of(DataStore, subtype) AND edge(DataStore, E, Target) THEN edge(subtype, E, Target)
inheritance_rules.example: RDS inherits 'replicates_to' edge type from Data Store

inheritance_rules.description: Network Gateway subtypes inherit routing edges from parent Network Gateway
inheritance_rules.rule: IF subtype_of(NetworkGateway, subtype) AND edge(NetworkGateway, E, Target) THEN edge(subtype, E, Target)
inheritance_rules.example: CDN inherits 'routes_to' edge type from Network Gateway

inheritance_rules.description: Infrastructure subtypes inherit containment edges from parent Infrastructure
inheritance_rules.rule: IF subtype_of(Infrastructure, subtype) AND edge(Infrastructure, E, Target) THEN edge(subtype, E, Target)
inheritance_rules.example: VPC inherits 'contains' edge type from Infrastructure

inheritance_rules.description: Subtype edges can be specialized with stricter assumptions
inheritance_rules.rule: IF subtype_of(Parent, Child) AND edge(Child, E, Target) THEN assumptions(Child, E) ⊇ assumptions(Parent, E)
inheritance_rules.example: Lambda invocations add 'cold start does not expose partial state' assumption

inheritance_rules.description: Edge types with source = User also apply to User subtypes
inheritance_rules.rule: IF subtype_of(User, subtype) AND edge(User, E, Target) THEN edge(subtype, E, Target)
inheritance_rules.example: Admin User inherits 'authenticates_to' edge type from User

inheritance_rules.description: Reverse inheritance: edges targeting a parent type also target its subtypes
inheritance_rules.rule: IF subtype_of(Parent, Child) AND edge(Source, E, Parent) THEN edge(Source, E, Child)
inheritance_rules.example: protects(SC, Service) also applies to protects(SC, Lambda)

graph_properties.trust_decay: Trust decreases by 1 hop across untrusted boundaries
graph_properties.assumption_derivation_method: For each edge in the graph, apply derivation rules to generate assumptions based on source type, target type, and relationship semantics
